title: Add missing wc_ecc_* bindings to wolfcrypt-rs if needed
description: Add wc_ecc_set_rng to the extern block in wolfcrypt-rs/src/lib.rs. This is the only missing binding: wc_ecc_check_key is already bound (line 3037). wc_ecc_set_rng is required because ECC_TIMING_RESISTANT is enabled in the pre-built wolfssl-install, causing wc_ecc_shared_secret to return MISSING_RNG_E if private_key->rng == NULL. Pattern: follow the style of existing wc_ecc_* bindings around line 3037. Declaration in wolfssl header: int wc_ecc_set_rng(ecc_key* key, WC_RNG* rng). After adding, run cargo build to confirm the symbol links.
